entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `messageJson` TEXT NOT NULL, `sentAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_SentMessageHistory_sentAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_SentMessageHistory_sentAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sentAt`)
